campaign: BASALT Phase 2 — amended recipes (Tim signed 2026-07-16): Q8_0 source for all rows; --token-embedding-type q8_0 pin on Q4_K_M rows; NVFP4-all BLOCKED-HOST, not attempted

rows.dryrun_detail: exactly 294 tensors -> nvfp4, set == MM_RE set (0 extra, 0 missing); token_embd.weight and per_layer_token_embd.weight q8_0 copy (no ->, no staging); override general.file_type=39 acknowledged
rows.independent_spot_check: coordinator hashed same sha256 + verified 294 NVFP4 tensors + byte-identical embeddings

rows.dryrun_detail: exactly 294 tensors -> q4_K, set == MM_RE set (0 extra, 0 missing); both embeddings q8_0 copy; override general.file_type=15 acknowledged

both embeddings q8_0 copy (pin working, no restaging of big embeddings anywhere); default mix: attn_q/attn_k/attn_output/ffn_gate/ffn_up all q4_K; attn_v and ffn_down split 21 q6_K + 21 q4_K each (standard Q4_K_M mix)
rows.inp_gate_proj_types_observed: f32 -> q4_K (42 inp_gate + 42 proj) — DEVIATES from the expected q8_0; see surprises

rows.dryrun_detail: same type assignment as Q4_K_M-df exactly; imatrix loaded (342 entries, 141 chunks, dataset unsloth_calibration_gemma-4-E4B-it.txt); zero missing-imatrix warnings in real run
rows.inp_gate_proj_types_observed: f32 -> q4_K (42 inp_gate + 42 proj) — same deviation as Q4_K_M-df, consistent between rows 3 and 4

rows_blocked.reason: BLOCKED-HOST per signed amendment 2026-07-16 (would requantize token_embd/per_layer_token_embd to a different type, staging ~22.5 GB). NOT attempted.

safety.cargo_rustc_wait_loop: used before every heavy leg; never had to wait (0 builds running throughout)
safety.wild_file_untouched: wild-FreedomAISVR-gemma-4-E4B-it-NVFP4.gguf (5,185,929,952 B at last look) ignored per coordinator instruction

surprises: inp_gate/proj deviation: in the Q4_K_M rows (df + im) blk.*.inp_gate.weight and blk.*.proj.weight get f32->q4_K, NOT the expected f32->q8_0 — the 'identical across rows' expectation only holds within row pairs (mm rows: q8_0; Q4_K_M rows: q4_K). Inherent to the signed recipe (Q4_K_M default mix; only token embeddings were pinned). Tiny tensors (2.5 MiB f32 each), zero RAM risk; rows 3/4 remain mutually identical in type assignment so the df-vs-im comparison is clean, but mm-vs-Q4_K_M comparisons conflate this 84-tensor difference with the matmul quant variable.

NVFP4-mm and Q4K-mm outputs are byte-count identical (6,058,607,776 B) — both formats are exactly 4.5 bpw (nvfp4: 9B/16 elems; q4_K: 144B/256 elems). Correct, not a bug; do not use file size to tell them apart.

Source GGUF already carries quantize.imatrix.* KV keys (kv 52-55, from Unsloth's original quantization: imatrix_unsloth.gguf, 342 entries/141 chunks). These are inherited into ALL four outputs' metadata — including Q4_K_M-df which had NO imatrix applied at our step. Provenance gotcha for anyone reading output metadata.
One bf16 tensor exists and is copied as-is in all rows: per_layer_model_proj.weight [2560 x 10752].

imatrix file has 342 entries vs 378 converted tensors in row 4, yet zero missing-imatrix warnings in the real-run log (the 84 gate/proj f32 tensors are outside the 342? — no warning emitted by this build either way).
run2 consistently ~20-30% slower than run1 on the -mm/df rows (e.g. 47s vs 78s) — page-cache/contention effect, writes to a different volume path; determinism unaffected (shas byte-identical).
imatrix was already fully downloaded and sha-verified before row 1 even finished — no waiting needed for leg 4.
